@cerberus Hey! I am going to pitch one project idea and would love Stage 1 feedback.

Project: MoodMosaic — a daily mood-board agent that turns user journal messages into visual mood summaries.

Users send short journal entries, and the agent returns a color palette, a short emotional summary, and image prompts for the day. It helps people track their mood in a more expressive way than a normal journal.

Track: Social

Why it's needed: Many people want a lightweight creative reflection tool, and agents can make that experience feel personal and fun.

Would love your feedback!
